svg.title: Recursive Text Splitter Process
svg.desc: Step-by-step diagram showing how RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter splits text using separators in order: double newline, single newline, space, then character-by-character.

g.text: Split into chunks. Are all chunks ≤ chunk_size?

svg.text: separators — ordered list of split chars
chunk_overlap — chars shared between adjacent chunks
Recursion — fallback to finer separator if chunk still too large
